mapper.select: SELECT RECIPE_BOARD_ID AS recipeBoardId, RECIPE_BOARD_TITLE AS recipeBoardTitle, RECIPE_BOARD_CONTENT AS recipeBoardContent, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, RECIPE_BOARD_CREATED_DATE AS recipeBoardCreatedDate, VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, AVG_RATING AS avgRating FROM RECIPE_BOARD ORDER BY RECIPE_BOARD_CREATED_DATE DESC
SELECT TYPE_ID AS typeId, TYPE_NAME AS typeName FROM TYPES WHERE TYPE_ID >= 2 ORDER BY TYPE_ID ASC
